response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song 'REBELLION' from on-screen graphics and Takane Lui's performance. 2. Performed web searches for '鷹嶺ルイ REBELLION 歌詞' and 'Takane Lui REBELLION lyrics'. 3. Search results identified the song as 'Requiem for the Rebel' by Takane Lui. 4. Obtained the full lyrics from the search results. 5. Mapped scenes, ensuring end time of the final scene matches the video duration, and constructed the JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a virtual concert performance by the VTuber Takane Lui for her song "REBELLION" (formally known as "Requiem for the Rebel"), followed by an announcement of her 1st Live concert.

scenes.description: Introductory segment with atmospheric lighting and stage setup before the performance begins.
Performance of the song 'REBELLION' ('Requiem for the Rebel') by Takane Lui on a gothic-themed stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
正しさだけ纏える術があれば
少しは救われるだろうか？
その瞳へと問いかける
護るべきを捨てるべきと
誰にかどわかされても
心通わないならそれは虚言だ
何も捨てずに抗う力なき亡者
その覚悟無き創造に正しさなどない
失えば失うほどに更に気高く
その意志で世界を恨め
心が軋んで何度引き裂かれようと抗え
か弱き一人を守り抜くための
この手の平がどれだけ汚れてしまっても
構わないさ君が笑うなら
僕は何にでもなる
浅ましい擬態
へつらうだけなら
人も獣も何一つ変わらない
鎖に似た自由を
嘆いてはいびつに愛でるのでしょう
どうか君だけは
僕を覚えていて欲しい
必ず君を自由へと誘う
俯けば俯くほどに更に気高く
その意志で世界を揺らせ
心が歪んで何もかもが崩れても抗え
か弱き一人を守り抜くための
この手の平がどれだけ汚れてしまっても
構わないさ君が笑うなら
何度だって壊してみせる
心から君が笑えた時
僕は報われるのだろう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If there were a way to just be right
Would I be saved a little?
I ask those eyes of yours
Even if you are tempted by someone to abandon what you should protect
If your heart doesn't reach it, it's a lie
I will resist without abandoning anything
Someone without power
Just that resolve to the outside
There is no such thing as right
Even if I lose more, I will become more noble
With that will, hate the world
Even if my heart creaks and is torn apart countless times, I will resist
For the sake of protecting one weak person
Even if these palms get dirty
I don't care if you smile
I will become anything
Shallow mimicry
If I just fawn over you
Neither man nor beast changes at all
I wonder if you lament the freedom that resembles chains
And love it in a twisted way
Please, just you
I want you to remember me
I will surely invite you to freedom
Even if I look down, I will become more noble
With that will, shake the world
Even if my heart is distorted and everything collapses, I will resist
For the sake of protecting one weak person
Even if these palms get dirty
I don't care if you smile
I will try to break it countless times
When you can smile from the bottom of your heart
I wonder if I will be rewarded

scenes.description: Post-song announcement segment where the performer confirms the details of her 1st Live concert.
